phrases.intent_en: Ask where the frog sculpture is hidden
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde está la rana escondida en la fachada?
phrases.pronunciation: DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah RAH-nah ehs-kon-DEE-dah en lah fah-KAH-dah

likely_response.local: En la fachada plateresca, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH fahth-AH-dah plah-teh-REH-skah AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: On the Plateresque façade, on the left.

responses.english: On the Plateresque façade, on the left.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH fahth-AH-dah plah-teh-REH-skah AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: En la fachada plateresca, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket office is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la taquilla de entradas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah tah-KEE-yah deh en-TRAH-dahs?

likely_response.local: Junto al Patio de Escuelas, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AHL pah-TEE-oh DEH eh-skoo-EH-lahs AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, next to the main entrance.

responses.english: Good morning, next to the main entrance.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AHL pah-TEE-oh DEH eh-skoo-EH-lahs AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Junto al Patio de Escuelas, a la derecha.

phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde comienza el tour guiado hoy?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DON-deh koh-MYEHN-sah el TOOR gee-AH-doh oy?

likely_response.local: Buenos días, en el patio de las Escuelas.
likely_response.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs EHN EHL pah-TEE-oh DEH LAHS eh-skoo-EH-lahs
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, in the Schools' courtyard.

responses.english: Good morning, in the Schools' courtyard.
responses.phonetic: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs EHN EHL pah-TEE-oh DEH LAHS eh-skoo-EH-lahs
responses.french: Buenos días, en el patio de las Escuelas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where evening cultural events are typically held
phrases.text_local: Perdón, ¿en qué edificio son los eventos culturales nocturnos?
phrases.pronunciation: Per-DON, en keh eh-DEE-fee-oh son los eh-VEN-tos kul-too-RAH-les nok-TOOR-nos?

likely_response.local: En el Aula Magna, planta baja.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL ah-OO-lah MAHH-nah PLAHN-tah BAH-hah
likely_response.translation_en: In the Great Hall, ground floor.

responses.english: In the Great Hall, ground floor.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL ah-OO-lah MAHH-nah PLAHN-tah BAH-hah
responses.french: En el Aula Magna, planta baja.
